eventType.description: Type of Radarr event (e.g. MovieAdded, Test, etc)

movieFile.description: Radarr movie file payload. Required for anything other than test hooks

movie.description: Radarr movie payload. Can be used to sync movies from Radarr if not found in Bazarr

episodes.description: List of episodes. Can be used to sync episodes from Sonarr if not found in Bazarr.

episodeFiles.description: List of episode files; required for anything other than test hooks
